cited_facts.why_it_matters: Describes the technical functionality of the DynamicNFT amendment (NFTokenModify transaction and tfMutable flag) but does not contain any information regarding the default vote configuration in the source code or release notes.

output_json.decision_summary: The provided packet facts describe the technical features of the DynamicNFT amendment, the general amendment process, and the version it was introduced in. None of the facts explicitly state or imply the default vote (YES or NO) configured in the latest stable release source code. Without explicit evidence of the default vote setting, the task rule requires outputting UNKNOWN.
output_json.forbidden_stronger_claim: This output is a replay classification, not proof of amendment correctness.
